name: Sugar Cookies/Cut-Outs
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream butter in a large mixing bowl.
2. Add sugar and beat until light and fluffy.
3. Beat in egg, lemon peel, and vanilla until well blended.
4. Gradually mix in flour and salt until well combined.
5. Add water, a few drops at a time, only until the dough starts to come away from the sides of the bowl.
6. Shape the dough into a large flat disk, wrap in plastic wrap, and refrigerate for 2-3 hours.
7. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
8. Roll the dough on a lightly floured surface until it is about 1/8 inch thick.
9. Cut shapes with cookie cutters dipped in flour.
10. Bake for 10-12 minutes, or until the edges begin to brown.
11. Remove from the baking sheets and cool completely on wire racks.
12. Decorate as desired if the cookies have not been painted.
